name: agents-team
description: Agents-Team brings Goal-driven delivery, risk-aware autonomy, and independent QA to Codex projects.

interface.shortDescription: Goal-driven delivery and independent QA for projects.
interface.longDescription: Initialize and operate a reusable GitHub-first collaboration mechanism for a project owner, a primary Codex, and task-specific workers.
interface.defaultPrompt: 初始化当前项目的团队协作机制，先扫描并预览，不要直接写入。
